definition: Market rent level and trend for residential stock
aggregation_rule: Unit-weighted median or average by stock base
qa_bounds: rent>=0; yoy outlier flags outside expected policy bounds
caveats: Ask-vs-effective differences and concessions normalization required. Rent per sq ft (rent normalized by interior size) stays on concept_code rent—use metric rows and table unit columns (e.g. median_rent_*_unit); do not introduce a separate concept for PSF.

definition: Share of occupied units
aggregation_rule: Unit-weighted occupancy rate
caveats: Physical vs economic occupancy semantics differ

definition: Share of unoccupied units
aggregation_rule: Unit-weighted vacancy rate
caveats: Market vacancy and physical vacancy can differ

definition: Employment level and trend signal
aggregation_rule: Counts additive; rates weighted by employment base
caveats: Residence-vs-workplace geography differences must be explicit

definition: Labor market slack as unemployment share
aggregation_rule: Rate weighted by labor-force denominator
caveats: LAUS CBSA AREA_CODE join caveat vs OMB CBSA

definition: Authorized residential permits as forward supply proxy
aggregation_rule: Counts additive; ratios weighted by stock base
caveats: Permits are not starts/completions and can revise

definition: Net household/person movement demand proxy
canonical_metric_priority: irs soi > acs migration > usps proxy
aggregation_rule: Counts additive; rates weighted by population base
caveats: Household-vs-person normalization and source lags required

definition: Resident population stock
aggregation_rule: Counts additive
qa_bounds: Non-negative with YoY swing flags and boundary checks
caveats: Boundary/vintage changes must be versioned

definition: Residential sale value level/trend
canonical_metric_priority: fhfa hpi + zillow + avm + recorder comps
aggregation_rule: Rates/index weighted by transaction volume
qa_bounds: Non-negative price with YoY outlier checks
caveats: Mix-shift bias in medians must be documented

definition: Demand clearing speed versus available supply
canonical_metric_priority: costar mf net absorption units > rca/msxi vendor panels > internal audited blends
aggregation_rule: Units additive; pace ratios weighted by inventory
qa_bounds: Non-negative net absorption where counts are defined; inventory denominators must match vendor definition
caveats: Register MLS DOM active counts and closed-sale counts under listings or transactions—not absorption; DOM alone is not net absorption

definition: Future deliverable supply pressure
aggregation_rule: Units additive; months-of-supply derived with trailing absorption
caveats: Double-counting across project stages is common

definition: Safety risk proxy for demand/pricing
aggregation_rule: Rates weighted by population
caveats: UCR->NIBRS comparability caveat must be documented

definition: Education quality proxy
aggregation_rule: Enrollment-weighted index
qa_bounds: Bounded index check per scale and drift flags
caveats: District boundary and rubric changes require versioning

definition: Household earning capacity and affordability support
canonical_metric_priority: acs median hh income > irs distributions
aggregation_rule: Medians and growth computed on consistent inflation basis
caveats: Nominal-vs-real basis must be explicit

definition: Net operating income before capital structure
aggregation_rule: Dollar sums with optional normalization at aggregate levels
caveats: In-place vs stabilized NOI requires explicit tag

definition: Debt service coverage ratio NOI/debt service
aggregation_rule: Portfolio aggregation weighted by loan balance
caveats: Interest-only periods and term changes affect comparability

definition: Yield proxy from NOI/value or transaction implied yields
aggregation_rule: Weighted by transaction value
qa_bounds: Policy envelope checks with outlier flagging
caveats: Going-in vs stabilized vs terminal caps must be tagged

definition: Loan-to-value leverage ratio
aggregation_rule: Weighted by loan balance
caveats: Value source provenance must be explicit

definition: Share of loans/units past due by bucket
aggregation_rule: Balance-weighted delinquency rates with ordered bucket logic
caveats: Cure/re-aging and denominator policy vary by source

definition: Leasing incentive level reducing effective rent
aggregation_rule: Unit-weighted average concession level
caveats: Upfront-vs-amortized concession normalization needed

definition: Exposure of workforce task mix to automation/displacement
grain_spec: national baseline + county x occupation; annual
canonical_metric_priority: onet task vectors + epoch exposure + bls/qcew employment
aggregation_rule: Exposure index weighted by occupation employment share
qa_bounds: Index bounded and employment-share sum checks
caveats: SOC crosswalk vintage must be explicit
slot_forecast: Scenario overlays only for adoption path

definition: Sale counts/volume and turnover intensity
aggregation_rule: Counts additive with weighted medians/psf where used
qa_bounds: Non-negative with dedupe and lag corrections
caveats: Recording lag and multi-parcel dedupe policy required

definition: Policy and benchmark interest-rate levels
aggregation_rule: Levels and changes with revision flags
qa_bounds: Non-negative nominal policy rate checks where applicable
caveats: Product mapping vs cap_rate macro bundle must be explicit

definition: Consumer and producer price inflation
aggregation_rule: Index level and YoY with base-year explicit
caveats: Index revision and rebasing must be versioned

definition: Earnings and payroll wages
grain_spec: national to county; monthly to annual
canonical_metric_priority: bls qcew > ces > oxford macro where licensed
aggregation_rule: Dollars additive at aggregate; medians weighted
qa_bounds: Non-negative wage series with outlier checks
caveats: Mix and composition shifts across sectors

definition: Labor-force participation and slack complements
canonical_metric_priority: bls laus participation > cps where available
aggregation_rule: Rate from LF and population denominators
caveats: CPS vs LAUS residence definitions must be explicit

definition: Counts and listing-state measures from on-market channels only (MLS portal asking-inventory feeds). Explicitly excludes assessor or parcel-universe housing stock totals and is not the same as completed sales (transactions).
canonical_metric_priority: zillow research > realtor inventory > mls long tail
aggregation_rule: Vendor-native additive counts at stable geo x frequency; DOM as listing-process timing
qa_bounds: Non-negative counts where applicable; DOM and price-cut bands vendor-documented
caveats: Pending contingent and off-MLS pocket listings follow vendor definitions; do not relabel universe stock metrics here

definition: Structure unit and parcel inventory from universe sources (assessor tax roll parcel fabric Cherre-style stock snapshots) on or off market. Explicitly excludes definitions that count only active MLS or portal listings.
canonical_metric_priority: cherre stock universe > assessor roll > census building stock
aggregation_rule: Additive counts by parcel or unit with explicit dedupe rules
qa_bounds: Non-negative stock with YoY sanity checks
caveats: Vacancy and occupancy rates stay on vacancy or occupancy concepts; listing-only flows stay on listings

definition: Progress SFDC disposition exit economics list price contract net proceeds DOM vs IC disposition workflow
grain_spec: property one row per SFDC_DISPOSITION__C record current state
canonical_metric_priority: sfdc_disposition__c wide extract > join bpo via concept_progress_disposition_bpo
aggregation_rule: Wide row not additive across deals; version by LASTMODIFIEDDATE
qa_bounds: Non-null property key; currency fields reconcile to IC
caveats: Do not treat list or contract price as market homeprice index—deal-specific; market tightness stays on listings or absorption concepts
slot_current: Latest disposition row by mod stamp
slot_historical: SFDC history table if landed for true time series

definition: O*NET BLS pipeline and workforce-forward indicator stack
grain_spec: national through county; annual or monthly
aggregation_rule: Vendor-weighted composites when employment shares resolve
qa_bounds: Non-negative indexes with SOC vintage drift flags
caveats: Do not silently substitute supply_pipeline units; crosswalk in metric documentation

definition: Census ACS school-age cohorts and attainment shares
aggregation_rule: Population-share rates on stable denominators
qa_bounds: 0-1 bounds for attainment shares where applicable
caveats: Do not merge with school_quality index composites in UI without explicit mapping
